statement: In every magma, Equation 1690 (`x = (y * x) * ((x * z) * w)`) implies Equation 142 (`x = y * ((z * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0737
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op x z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z z) x))
